heading: United States attorneys to represent Indians
label: 175 United States attorneys to represent Indians
text: In all States and Territories where there are reservations or allotted Indians the United States attorney shall represent them in all suits at law and in equity.
notes: Change of Name“United States attorney” substituted in text for “United States district attorney” on authority of act . See , Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.June 25, 1948section 541 of Title 28
